title: Copeca Scenario
description: A benchmark scenario — tasks × modes × models × repetitions matrix.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this scenario measures.

tasks.description: Task names or globs to include in this scenario.

modes.description: Modes to run each task under. Default: ["baseline"].

repetitions.description: Number of repetitions per (task, mode, model) combination.

budget_usd.description: Maximum USD cost per run before aborting.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds per run before timeout.

adversarial_thresholds.description: Per-scenario thresholds for adversarial flag computation (plan §5).

snowball_factor.description: Factor for token_snowball: fires when max(per_turn) > num_turns × avg(first_3) × factor.

talkative_tokens.description: Output token threshold for talkative_failure (fires when output_tokens > threshold AND wrong).

tool_storm_calls.description: Tool call threshold for tool_storm (fires when num_tool_calls > threshold).
